text:
US' Noah Lyles (C) crosses the finish line ahead of Botswana's Letsile Tebogo (2nd L), Italy's Lamont Marcell Jacobs (L), Jamaica's Oblique Seville (unseen), South Africa's Akani Simbine (2nd R) and Jamaica's Kishane Thompson (R) in the men's 100m final.[AFP]

World champion Noah Lyles roared to victory in 9.79sec to claim gold in a dramatic men's Olympic 100m final in Paris on Sunday.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Paris 2024: Lyles wins Olympic 100m gold in closest finish in modern history
author: AFP
description: The World champions clocked 9.79sec to emerge top.
